English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Scott Elledge papers
Elledge, Scott
14-12-3592
1.4 cubic feet. 1.4 cubic feet.
1945-1986. Printed Materials, Correspondence, Photographs Includes course material, correspondence and material from his book on E.B. White. Collection material in English 6057901
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Meaghan Corbett
Date completed:
June 2007
EAD encoding:
Meaghan Corbett, June 2007
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Professor of English, Cornell University from 1962-1984.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes course material, correspondence and material from his book on E.B. White.
Cite As:
Scott Elledge papers, #14/12/3592. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
English literature -- Study and teaching. College teachers. E.B. White (Elwyn Brooks), 1899-1985. Cornell University. English Department Cornell University -- : Faculty.
